payload.evidence: Frozen 6e8243f extraction and e3980e5 planning control; 392 blob-owned paths; 660 exactly mapped live rows across 16 tables with zero closure violations; 32 cutoff changesets/322 operations; 16 worktree restore rehearsals; WAL-safe snapshot; 31 ignored SQLite backups; 8 unreachable commit patches; 73 CLI + 99 Symphony Rust tests, Web build, 19 Playwright, desktop smoke, fmt, clippy, replay and validator tests; positive verifier plus 11 tamper fixtures.
